svg.title: NaviSense — marine autonomy simulation
svg.desc: An autonomous explorer yacht on a realistic dusk sea with sun-glitter and swell, showing its sensor suite: radar sweep, LiDAR fan, EO/IR camera cone, forward sonar, GNSS uplink and AIS, with a telemetry and sensor-status HUD. Branded NaviSense by NaviSyn Marine Solutions.

g.text: Marine Autonomy Simulation Platform · CFD-validated physics · synthetic sensors · COLREGS
